patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp b/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
index 3f3f6c6e0d1a..fe7ab24a80e8 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
@@ -4593,6 +4593,46 @@ static Value *simplifySelectInst(Value *Cond, Value *TrueVal, Value *FalseVal,
         match(TrueVal, m_ZeroInt()))
       return ConstantInt::getFalse(Cond->getType());
 
+
+    // OR-absorption: select (select X, Y, false), true, Y --> Y
+    if (match(Cond, m_Select(m_Value(), m_Specific(FalseVal), m_ZeroInt())) &&
+        match(TrueVal, m_One()))
+      return FalseVal;
+    // OR-absorption: select (select X, Y, false), true, X --> X
+    if (match(Cond, m_Select(m_Specific(FalseVal), m_Value(), m_ZeroInt())) &&
+        match(TrueVal, m_One()))
+      return FalseVal;
+    // OR-absorption: select X, true, (select X, Y, false) --> X
+    if (match(FalseVal, m_Select(m_Specific(Cond), m_Value(), m_ZeroInt())) &&
+        match(TrueVal, m_One()))
+      return Cond;
+    // OR-absorption: select X, true, (select Y, X, false) --> X
+    if (match(FalseVal, m_Select(m_Value(), m_Specific(Cond), m_ZeroInt())) &&
+        match(TrueVal, m_One()))
+      return Cond;
+    // OR-absorption: select X, true, (and X, Y) --> X
+    if (match(FalseVal, m_c_And(m_Specific(Cond), m_Value())) &&
+        match(TrueVal, m_One()))
+      return Cond;
+
+    // AND-absorption: select (select X, true, Y), Y, false --> Y
+    if (match(Cond, m_Select(m_Value(), m_One(), m_Specific(TrueVal))) &&
+        match(FalseVal, m_ZeroInt()))
+      return TrueVal;
+    // AND-absorption: select (select X, true, Y), X, false --> X
+    if (match(Cond, m_Select(m_Specific(TrueVal), m_One(), m_Value())) &&
+        match(FalseVal, m_ZeroInt()))
+      return TrueVal;
+    // AND-absorption: select X, (select X, true, Y), false --> X
+    if (match(TrueVal, m_Select(m_Specific(Cond), m_One(), m_Value())) &&
+        match(FalseVal, m_ZeroInt()))
+      return Cond;
+    // AND-absorption: select X, (select Y, true, X), false --> X
+    if (match(TrueVal, m_Select(m_Value(), m_One(), m_Specific(Cond))) &&
+        match(FalseVal, m_ZeroInt()))
+      return Cond;
+
+
     Value *X, *Y;
     if (match(FalseVal, m_ZeroInt())) {
       // !(X || Y) && X --> false (commuted 2 ways)

log.name: land_lor_left2
log.body:
define i1 @land_lor_left2(i1 %A, i1 %B) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @land_lor_left2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[A:%.*]]
  %c = select i1 %B, i1 %A, i1 false
  %res = select i1 %c, i1 true, i1 %A
  ret i1 %res
}

alive2.src:
define i1 @land_lor_left2(i1 %A, i1 %B) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @land_lor_left2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[A:%.*]]
  %c = select i1 %B, i1 %A, i1 false
  %res = select i1 %c, i1 true, i1 %A
  ret i1 %res
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @land_lor_left2(i1 %A, i1 %B) {
#0:
  %c = select i1 %B, i1 %A, i1 0
  %res = select i1 %c, i1 1, i1 %A
  ret i1 %res
}
=>
define i1 @land_lor_left2(i1 %A, i1 %B) {
#0:
  ret i1 %A
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

filecheck.src:

; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[A:%.*]]
  %c = select i1 %B, i1 %A, i1 false
  %res = select i1 %c, i1 true, i1 %A
  ret i1 %res
}

log.name: or_logic_vector
log.body:
define <2 x i1> @or_logic_vector(<2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_logic_vector(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i1> [[X:%.*]]
  %a = and <2 x i1> %x, %y
  %r = select <2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> <i1 true, i1 true>, <2 x i1> %a
  ret <2 x i1> %r
}

----------------------------------------
define <2 x i1> @or_logic_vector(<2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> %y) {
#0:
  %a = and <2 x i1> %x, %y
  %r = select <2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> { 1, 1 }, <2 x i1> %a
  ret <2 x i1> %r
}
=>
define <2 x i1> @or_logic_vector(<2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> %y) {
#0:
  ret <2 x i1> %x
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
